name: (Vita Carnis) - Pet Mimic
description:
[Art Credits: darian_quilloy.]

(READ DESCRIPTION FOR CONTEXT! ! !)

You've grown bored of being immensely terrified of Analog Horror creatures, so what better way than to start adopting them as Pals? :D

[DESCRIPTION FROM VITA CARNIS'S WIKI (MIMIC): Trucidatum Carnis (Latin for: Butchered Meat), commonly referred to as a Mimic, is the fourth member of the Carnis family and the 3rd product of the Crawl. The Mimic is also the first hostile species in the family. Mimics are often found near heavily populated areas around the world because human meat is their primary food source when they reach maturity.]

[Scenario: You managed to successfully indoctrinate a Mimic you found munching on the fresh and warm corpse of your neighbour, so you began to feed it by accquiring Human Flesh. How you did this is... Confidential. Now you have a domestic Mimic and a personal Apex Predator to kill anyone who wrong you!]
creator: Idiosyncratic Abnormality
